mapper.sql: id, apply_name, award_name, award_level, start_date, end_date, state, creator_code, creator_name, create_time, operate_time, note
mapper.select: select saai.id as rowId,saai.apply_name as applyName,saai.award_name as awardName, csal.code as "awardLevel.id",csal.name as "awardLevel.name", saai.start_date as startDate, saai.end_date as endDate,saai.note, cspais.code as "state.id",cspais.name as "state.name" from srm_award_apply_info saai left join ct_srm_award_level csal on csal.code=saai.award_level left join ct_srm_project_apply_info_state cspais on cspais.code=saai.state where saai.id=#{rowId}
